testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Calendar: Page Structure loads calendar page
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Page Structure shows navigation buttons
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Page Structure shows month/year in calendar title
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Page Structure renders 7 day-name headers
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Page Structure renders day cells (>= 28 for any month)
testcase.classname: renders day cells (>= 28 for any month)

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Calendar: Page Structure marks today cell with .today class
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Page Structure shows sidebar menu
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Navigation Next button changes month title
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Navigation Prev button changes month title
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Navigation Prev then Next returns to original month
testcase.classname: Prev then Next returns to original month

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Calendar: Navigation calendar re-renders cells after navigation
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Events event chips render if calendar is configured
testcase.classname: event chips render if calendar is configured

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Calendar: Events event chip click navigates to edit.php
testcase.classname: event chip click navigates to edit.php

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Calendar: Events event chip has background color set
testcase.classname: event chip has background color set

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Calendar: Events event chip is draggable
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Mobile loads calendar on mobile viewport
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Mobile calendar title visible on mobile
OpenSparrow – Calendar: Mobile navigation buttons exist on mobile
